memberdef.argsstring: (FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef)
memberdef.name: Oauth2

memberdef.argsstring: (FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FString const &InIamServerUrl)
memberdef.name: Oauth2

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &AuthorizationCode, FString const &RedirectUri, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithAuthorizationCode

briefdescription.para: Get access token using authorization code from AccelByte Launcher.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This should be filled with "JUSTICE_AUTHORIZATION_CODE" environment variable.
The URL the IAM server will redirect you to when the operation succeeded. Again, this doesn't work at all. Do not use this function!!!
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future, so please use GetTokenWithAuthorizationCodeV3(FString const& ClientId , FString const& ClientSecret, FString const& AuthorizationCode, FString const& RedirectUri , THandler<FOauth2Token>& OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const& OnError, FString const& IamUrl)

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &AuthorizationCode, FString const &RedirectUri, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithAuthorizationCode

briefdescription.para: Get access token using authorization code from AccelByte Launcher.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This should be filled with "JUSTICE_AUTHORIZATION_CODE" environment variable.
The URL the IAM server will redirect you to when the operation succeeded. Again, this doesn't work at all. Do not use this function!!!
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future, so please use GetTokenWithAuthorizationCodeV3(FString const& ClientId , FString const& ClientSecret, FString const& AuthorizationCode, FString const& RedirectUri , THandler<FOauth2Token>& OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const& OnError, FString const& IamUrl)

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithPasswordCredentials

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user using a registered Email account.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The email address.
The password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future, so please use GetTokenWithPasswordCredentialsV3(FString const& ClientId , FString const& ClientSecret, FString const& Username, FString const& Password, THandler<FOauth2Token>& OnSuccess , FOAuthErrorHandler const& OnError, FString const& IamUrl)

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithPasswordCredentials

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user using a registered Email Account with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The email address.
The password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

xrefdescription.para: This method will be removed in the future, so please use GetTokenWithPasswordCredentialsV3(FString const& ClientId , FString const& ClientSecret, FString const& Username, FString const& Password, THandler<FOauth2Token>& OnSuccess , FOAuthErrorHandler const& OnError, FString const& IamUrl)

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithClientCredentials

briefdescription.para: Get access token from specified OAuth/IAM client.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), bool bCreateHeadless=true, TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithDeviceId

briefdescription.para: Get access token using the user's device information and its unique Id. This will automatically obtain user's device information using a utilities function.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), bool bCreateHeadless=true, TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithDeviceId

briefdescription.para: Get access token using the user's device information and its unique Id. This will automatically obtain user's device information using a utilities function.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &PlatformId, FString const &PlatformToken, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FAccelByteLoginWithOtherPlatformOptionalParameters OptionalParams={}, FString const &EncodedMacAddress=TEXT(""), FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithOtherPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user with their native platform account, e.g., Steam, Google, Facebook, Twitter, Twitch, etc.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The PlatformId. The platform ID.
The Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.
Will be passed to the backend.

simplesect.para: When 2FA is enabled please use the method with FOAuthErrorHandler to get more details about the OAuth errors.
AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &PlatformId, FString const &PlatformToken, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FAccelByteLoginWithOtherPlatformOptionalParameters OptionalParams={}, FString const &EncodedMacAddress=TEXT(""), FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithOtherPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user with their native platform account, e.g., Steam, Google, Facebook, Twitter, Twitch, etc. with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The PlatformId. The platform ID.
The Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) A boolean flag to specify new account creation if needed, default value is true
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.
Will be passed to the backend.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &RefreshToken, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithRefreshToken

briefdescription.para: Get access token using specified refresh token as long as the refresh token is still valid.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued refresh token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &RefreshToken, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithRefreshToken

briefdescription.para: Get access token using specified refresh token as long as the refresh token is still valid with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued refresh token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientID, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &PlatformID, FString const &PlatformToken, THandler< FPlatformTokenRefreshResponse > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: RefreshPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: Refresh the platform token that is stored in the IAM backend. Therefore we can prevent expiration on the backend. This endpoint also not generate any event or AB Access/Refresh Token.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The targeted platform to be refreshed.
The platform token that will used to refresh IAM storage.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AccessToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: RevokeToken

briefdescription.para: Revoke specified access token to make it invalid.

parameterdescription.para: Specified Access Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

xrefdescription.para: This method is using wrong auth type, so please use RevokeToken(FString const& ClientId , FString const& ClientSecret, FString const& AccessToken, FVoidHandler const& OnSuccess , FOAuthErrorHandler const& OnError, FString const& IamUrl)

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &AccessToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: RevokeToken

briefdescription.para: Revoke specified access token to make it invalid.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
user Access Token or rather, Session Id.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &AccessToken, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: RevokeToken

briefdescription.para: Revoke specified access token to make it invalid.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
user Access Token or rather, Session Id.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &AuthorizationCode, FString const &RedirectUri, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithAuthorizationCodeV3

briefdescription.para: Get access token using authorization code from AccelByte Launcher.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This should be filled with "JUSTICE_AUTHORIZATION_CODE" environment variable.
The URL the IAM server will redirect you to when the operation succeeded. Again, this doesn't work at all. Do not use this function!!!
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: When 2FA is enabled please use the method with FOAuthErrorHandler to get more details about the OAuth errors.
AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &AuthorizationCode, FString const &RedirectUri, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithAuthorizationCodeV3

briefdescription.para: Get access token using authorization code from AccelByte Launcher with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This should be filled with "JUSTICE_AUTHORIZATION_CODE" environment variable.
The URL the IAM server will redirect you to when the operation succeeded. Again, this doesn't work at all. Do not use this function!!!
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberMe=false, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithPasswordCredentialsV3

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user using a registered Email account.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The email address.
The password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: When 2FA is enabled please use the method with FOAuthErrorHandler to get more details about the OAuth errors.
AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberMe=false, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithPasswordCredentialsV3

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user using a registered Email account with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The email address.
The password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &NativePlatformName, FString const &NativePlatformToken, FString const &SecondaryPlatformName, FString const &SecondaryPlatformToken, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithSimultaneousPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: Login with native platform and secondary platform. Currently support Windows only.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
From the native subsystem
The auth ticket from native identity interface
From the secondary platform subsystem
The auth ticket from secondary platform interface
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &MfaToken, EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType AuthFactorType, FString const &Code, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberDevice=false, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: VerifyAndRememberNewDevice

briefdescription.para: Verify and Remember new device when user enabled 2FA.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
Multi Factor Authentication Code, got error when user login with new device.
Type of authentication factor. Could be "EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType::Authenticator" or "EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType::BackupCode".
Code to verify new device, could be obtain by 3rd party authenticator app or back up code depend on what type of AuthFactor user set as default
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &LinkingToken, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: CreateHeadlessAccountAndResponseToken

briefdescription.para: Log user in with create headless account after 3rd platform authenticated Will return a "user" session id.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
Platform Linking Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FString const &LinkingToken, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: AuthenticationWithPlatformLink

briefdescription.para: Log user in with authenticate a user account and perform platform link. It validates user's email and password.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The email address.
The password.
Platform Linking Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
Token to be verified.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: GenerateOneTimeCode

briefdescription.para: Generate one time linking code.

parameterdescription.para: user Access Token or rather, Session Id.
The PlatformId. The platform ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Code, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GenerateGameToken

briefdescription.para: Generate publisher user's game token. Required a code from request game token.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The IAM service URL used to call the API.
code from request game token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AccessToken, FString const &PublisherNamespace, FString const &PublisherClientID, THandler< FCodeForTokenExchangeResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GenerateCodeForPublisherTokenExchange

briefdescription.para: This function generate a code that can be exchanged into publisher namespace token (i.e. by web portal).

parameterdescription.para: Player's access token.
The targeted game's publisher Namespace.
The targeted game's publisher ClientID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Namespace, FString const &UserId, FString const &PlatformId, FString const &Authorization, THandler< FThirdPartyPlatformTokenData > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: RetrieveUserThirdPartyPlatformToken

briefdescription.para: This function is used for retrieving third party platform token for user that login using third party, if user have not link requested platform in game namespace, will try to retrieving third party platform token from publisher namespace. Passing platform group name or it's member will return same access token that can be used across the platform members. Note: The third party platform and platform group covered for this is: (psn) ps4web, (psn) ps4, (psn) ps5, epicgames, twitch, awscognito.

parameterdescription.para: User's namespace
UserId.
Platform type value.
Authorization.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FThirdPartyPlatformTokenData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberMe=false, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithPasswordCredentialsV4

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user using a registered Email account with 2FA enabled and queue feature.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The email address.
The password.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), bool bCreateHeadless=true, TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithDeviceIdV4

briefdescription.para: Get access token using the user's device information and its unique Id. This will automatically obtain user's device information using a utilities function.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &AuthorizationCode, FString const &RedirectUri, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithAuthorizationCodeV4

briefdescription.para: Get access token using authorization code from AccelByte Launcher with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
This should be filled with "JUSTICE_AUTHORIZATION_CODE" environment variable.
The URL the IAM server will redirect you to when the operation succeeded. Again, this doesn't work at all. Do not use this function!!!
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &PlatformId, FString const &PlatformToken, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bCreateHeadless=true, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FAccelByteLoginWithOtherPlatformOptionalParameters OptionalParams={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""), FString const &EncodedMacAddress=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithOtherPlatformTokenV4

briefdescription.para: Get access token from the user with their native platform account, e.g., Steam, Google, Facebook, Twitter, Twitch, etc. with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The PlatformId. The platform ID.
The Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) A boolean flag to specify new account creation if needed, default value is true
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.
Will be passed to the backend.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &MfaToken, EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType AuthFactorType, FString const &Code, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, bool bRememberDevice=false, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: VerifyAndRememberNewDeviceV4

briefdescription.para: Verify and Remember new device when user enabled 2FA.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
Multi Factor Authentication Code, got error when user login with new device.
Type of authentication factor. Could be "EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType::Authenticator" or "EAccelByteLoginAuthFactorType::BackupCode".
Code to verify new device, could be obtain by 3rd party authenticator app or back up code depend on what type of AuthFactor user set as default
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will use for refresh token expiration extension, default value is false.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Code, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GenerateGameTokenV4

briefdescription.para: Generate publisher user's game token. Required a code from request game token.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The IAM service URL used to call the API.
code from request game token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &Username, FString const &Password, FString const &LinkingToken, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: AuthenticationWithPlatformLinkV4

briefdescription.para: Log user in with authenticate a user account and perform platform link. It validates user's email and password.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The email address.
The password.
Platform Linking Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &LinkingToken, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: CreateHeadlessAccountAndResponseTokenV4

briefdescription.para: Log user in with create headless account after 3rd platform authenticated Will return a "user" session id.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
Platform Linking Token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &NativePlatformName, FString const &NativePlatformToken, FString const &SecondaryPlatformName, FString const &SecondaryPlatformToken, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithSimultaneousPlatformTokenV4

briefdescription.para: Login with native platform and secondary platform. Currently support Windows only.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
From the native subsystem
The auth ticket from native identity interface
From the secondary platform subsystem
The auth ticket from secondary platform interface
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsOauth2Session.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &RefreshToken, THandler< FOauth2TokenV4 > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={})
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithRefreshTokenV4

briefdescription.para: Get access token using specified refresh token as long as the refresh token is still valid with 2FA enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued refresh token.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, FString const &LoginTicket, THandler< FOauth2Token > const &OnSuccess, FOAuthErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &IamUrl=TEXT(""), TMap< FString, FString > AdditionalHeaders={}, FString const &DeviceId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetTokenWithLoginTicket

briefdescription.para: Get access token from exchange login ticket.

parameterdescription.para: The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The issued OAuth2 client credentials.
The Data required to exchange, also contain the login ticket itself.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
(optional) The IAM service URL used to call the API, if it's an empty string then the value from FRegistry is used instead.
(optional) Additional headers that will be added to the HTTP Request.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (Oauth2 const &)=delete
memberdef.name: Oauth2

memberdef.argsstring: (Oauth2 &&)=delete
memberdef.name: Oauth2

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Url, FString const &ClientId, FString const &ClientSecret, TMap< FString, FString > const &AdditionalHeaders)
memberdef.name: ConstructTokenRequest

briefdescription.para: The API for getting OAuth2 access token. You should not use this directly; use UserAuthentication instead. Where the tokens are stored in memory for convenience.
